description_long: This bird has a slender, streamlined body with olive-yellow plumage covering most of its form, accented by a distinct dark brown head and nape. The wings and tail feathers display subtle, darker markings and a slight gradient, with the wing coverts and flight feathers showing muted brown and olive tones. The beak is short, straight, and pointed, blending seamlessly with the head's coloration. The legs are mostly hidden but appear to be a muted brown or gray, matching the overall earthy palette. The tail is moderately long and appears slightly rounded at the tip, with feathers neatly layered. The bird's surface is covered in fine, soft feathers, giving it a matte, non-reflective appearance.
description: A slender bird with olive-yellow body, dark brown head, and subtle wing markings. Its beak is short and pointed, and the tail is slightly rounded.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bird, highlighting the olive-yellow body and dark brown head.
description_view_1: Rear view focusing on the tail feathers and the symmetrical arrangement of the wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the beak and head coloration.
description_view_3: Front view showing the head, beak, and the transition from brown to yellow on the chest.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid olive-yellow body with a uniform dark brown head and subtle wing gradients
